info.title: ImoPanorama API
info.description: API documentation for ImoPanorama - Real Estate Platform in Madagascar

tags.name: Properties
tags.description: Unified property management (apartments, houses, villas, etc.)

post.description: Track page views, events, or session end (Public)

get.description: Retrieve aggregated analytics data (Admin only)

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password

400.description: Validation error or user already exists

post.description: Create a new admin user (Super Admin only)

get.description: Get all BatiPanorama construction projects (Public)

post.description: Create a new construction project (Admin/Super Admin only)

get.description: Retrieve project details (Public)

Get all quote requests (Admin only)

post.description: Submit a simple contact form (Public, rate limited)

get.description: Get all contact submissions (Admin/Super Admin only)
Get contact details (Admin only)

put.description: Mark a contact inquiry as read (Admin only)

get.description: Get total number of contacts (Admin only)
Get contact statistics (Admin only)
Get contacts submitted by the authenticated user
Get all frequently asked questions (Public)

post.description: Create a new FAQ (Admin/Super Admin only)

get.description: Retrieve a specific FAQ
Get all unique FAQ categories (Public)
List all properties/terrains favorited by the authenticated user

post.description: Add a property/terrain to user's favorites

terrainId.description: ID of the terrain/property to favorite

delete.description: Remove all items from user's favorites

get.description: Check if a specific terrain is in user's favorites

delete.description: Remove a specific terrain from user's favorites

post.description: Upload single or multiple images to BunnyCDN (Admin/Agent only)

images.description: Image files to upload (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF)

get.description: List images in a directory (Admin/Agent only)

delete.description: Delete an image by path (Admin/Agent only)

post.description: Upload images via admin interface (Admin/Agent only)

get.description: Get a list of all uploaded images (Admin only)
Get all published news articles (Public)
Retrieve a news article by its URL slug (Public)

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: URL-friendly slug of the news article

get.description: Retrieve a news article by its ID (Public)
Get all news articles including unpublished ones

post.description: Create a new news article (Admin only)

get.description: Get all active partners (Public)
Get all partners including inactive ones
Get paginated list of properties with advanced filtering

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Text search in title and description

description.example: Spacious modern apartment with great view

get.description: Retrieve detailed property information
